task: Allow deletion only when the record is deletable AND the user is either the record owner or an admin. Implement ApiGuard.can_delete() in api_guard.py.
correctness_argument: Explicit parentheses around `(user.is_admin or user.id == record.owner_id)` make the intent unambiguous and force the correct evaluation order. `record.deletable` is checked first for all callers; only then is the owner/admin check evaluated, so admins cannot bypass the deletable flag.
